heading: Merchant Seamen Licenses, Certificates, and Documents
label: E Merchant Seamen Licenses, Certificates, and Documents
notes: Historical and Revision NotesPart E establishes the authority for the Coast Guard to issue, suspend, and revoke licenses, certificates of registry, and merchant mariner’s documents for individuals who are to be engaged on vessels of the United States.

Amendments1985—, , , substituted “Merchant Seamen Licenses, Certificates, and” for “Licenses, Certificates, and Merchant Mariners’ ” in part E heading.Pub. L. 99–36, § 1(a)(9)(B)99 Stat. 67May 15, 1985

children.heading: GENERAL PROCEDURES FOR LICENSING, CERTIFICATION, AND DOCUMENTATION
